name: FJVFBA
pitch: Interactive Renaissance copperplate engraving. Renders as a beautiful sepia print on textured parchment paper when idle. Hovering transmutes the ink lines into gleaming, reflective bronze V-grooves that catch cursor-reactive light, with metallic Fresnel reflections. Velocity-biased oxidation spreads directional verdigris tarnish with angle-dependent thin-film iridescent fringes and soft colored crystalline sparkles. Grooves tarnish and oxidise back to sepia when resting.

lifecycle.idle: Detailed sepia-on-parchment copperplate engraving with soft multi-tone copper textures and organic grain in its default state
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, exposing initial metallic bronze lines along engraving paths with cursor-reactive light
lifecycle.buildUp: Transmutation wavefront expands, velocity-biased verdigris oxidation spreads directionally with thin-film iridescent margins
lifecycle.peak: Gleaming bronze V-groove cuts catching volumetric cursor highlights, Fresnel rim reflections, colored crystalline sparkles in tarnish channels
lifecycle.recovery: Exposed bronze plate tarnishes and oxidizes, fading back to charcoal sepia ink on paper
